english: Truth, knowledge, infinite, eternal, not the sky but the supreme sky
roman: Satyam gyanam anantam nityam anakasham param akasham

english: Govinda the bliss of love, the bliss of consciousness, the bliss of truth
roman: Govindam prema nandham chid anandam satya nandham

english: Sky-pervading, thread of the moon, wearing radiant yellow silk
roman: Vyoma tatam soma sutram virajat pita kauseyam

english: Govinda the bliss of love, the bliss of consciousness, the bliss of truth
roman: Govindam prema nandam chid anandam satya nandham

english: Dark as clouds, wearing yellow silk, marked with Shrivatsa, adorned with Kaustubha gem
roman: Megha shyamam pita kauseya vasam Shrivatsa ankam Kaustubha abharanam

english: Govinda the bliss of love, the bliss of consciousness, the bliss of truth
roman: Govindam prema nandham chid anandam satya nandham

english: This Govinda Ashtakam — whoever sings, remembers and worships it daily
roman: Govinda ashtakam etan nityam gati yah smarati bhajati

english: Attains Govinda, the bliss of love and the bliss of consciousness
roman: Govindam prema nandam chid anandam samprapnoti
